*�����������������w# me - this DAT.
#
# dat - the changed DAT
# rows - a list of row indices
# cols - a list of column indices
# cells - the list of cells that have changed content
# prev - the list of previous string contents of the changed cells
#
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the DAT Execute DAT.
#
# If rows or columns are deleted, sizeChange will be called instead of row/col/cellChange.


def onTableChange(dat):
	parent.Widget.par.Value0 = op('textBuffer').text
	return

def onRowChange(dat, rows):
	return

def onColChange(dat, cols):
	return

def onCellChange(dat, cells, prev):
	return

def onSizeChange(dat):
	return

2
*�����������������## me - this DAT
# par - the Par object that has changed
# val - the current value
# prev - the previous value
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Parameter Execute DAT.

def valueChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def onPulse(par):
	text = parent.Widget.par.Value0.eval()
	#debug(text)
	op('textBuffer').text = text
	op('textBuffer').par.edit.pulse()
	
def expressionChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def exportChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def enableChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def modeChange(par, val, prev):
	return
